title: Vectors
description: Representing vectors in component form, calculating magnitude, adding and scaling vectors, and using position vectors to solve geometric problems such as collinearity and midpoints.
objectives: Represent a vector in component (column) form in two and three dimensions
Calculate the magnitude of a vector using Pythagoras' theorem
Add, subtract and scale vectors component-wise, and find unit vectors
Use position vectors to find the vector between two points
Use vectors to prove points are collinear and lines are parallel, and to find midpoints
